overall_summary.title: Project-Based Engineering Experience
overall_summary.description: Although I have not yet worked as a full-time software engineer, my experience comes from building ambitious, end-to-end engineering projects, participating in national hackathons, conducting research and continuously learning through hands-on development.

domains.experience: Designed machine learning solutions for hazard prediction, recommendation systems and conversational AI.
Built autonomous robotic systems using ROS2, SLAM, Gazebo and Nav2 for lunar habitat exploration.
Developed complete software systems including frontend, backend, authentication, dashboards and databases.
Worked on autonomous lunar robotics research accepted for IEEE SPACE Conference 2026.
Integrated satellite imagery, terrain models, GIS tools and machine learning for mining hazard prediction.

leadership.experience: Led multiple all-girls engineering teams across hackathons and national innovation competitions.

teamwork.experience: Worked in multidisciplinary teams under strict deadlines while learning completely new technologies.

problem_solving.experience: Most projects required solving unfamiliar problems instead of following tutorials.
examples: Learning ROS2 from scratch for SIH

technical_growth.today: Able to independently learn unfamiliar technologies and combine them into complete engineering solutions.

experience_highlights: AI + Robotics + GIS + Full Stack experience

areas_for_growth: Sometimes I spend too much time polishing ideas before considering them complete.
Learning to balance ambition with delivery speed.
